rationale: No events this cycle directly affect Portugal; Iran deal uncertainty and Beirut strikes maintain a faint indirect energy price signal, but nothing qualitatively new reaches the Portuguese resident's daily life.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Israel strikes Beirut
top_events.summary: Continued Iran deal uncertainty and Beirut strikes keep a mild upward pressure on global oil prices, which can marginally affect Portuguese fuel and energy costs, but no new shock this cycle.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: A major UK-Japan investment deal signals continued Western economic cooperation; very indirect relevance for Portugal's trade environment but no direct daily impact.

top_events.title: Tourist train overturns injuring 17 at Cártama tapas festival
top_events.summary: A tourist train accident in nearby Spain is geographically close and touches Portugal's shared tourism sector image, though impact on Portuguese residents is minimal.
